programmes.show_description: As it's just ticked over into Tuesday, OJ wants to hear about what cheered you up on Monday, the little wins that made it a Blue Sky Monday.

programmes.show_name: One Hit Wonders with OJ Borg
programmes.show_description: OJ is celebrating 41 years since The Dream Academy released Life In A Northern Town, and heading back to 1985 with Full Force, Sharpe & Numan and The Big Sound Authority.

programmes.show_name: Dance Sounds of the 90s with Vernon Kay
programmes.show_description: What were you doing in 1992? Vernon has a nostalgia filled soundtrack to take you right back to the best decade in dance, with tunes from Inner City, The Shamen, The Prodigy & more.
It's Early Breakfast with Owain Wyn Evans, featuring Step Back in Time and Airdrum Anthems. This morning we are asking you about the most memorable TV theme songs!
Scott's got your morning sorted... with Sarah Michelle Gellar and Kathryn Newton! Come and play the Birthday Game or take on the Easiest Quiz on the Radio.
Two listeners take on Vernon's mid-morning music quiz Ten To The Top. Plus, actress Holliday Grainger, star of The Capture, joins Vernon this week to choose her Tracks Of My Years.
Jeremy and guests discuss the news headlines and talk to the people making them.
Trevor is bringing you some of the best music from across the decades to get you through the afternoon.
Sara gets you through teatime with plenty of giggles and some fab music. Plus Totally Teavoted, the SARA Awards, Lost Four Five Words and Hatched, Matched and Dispatched.
Sara plays the biggest and best tunes to get you up dancing!
Jo brings her Shiny Happy Playlist, 30 minutes of feel-good music from 7-7.30pm to soundtrack listeners' weekday evening.
Jo chats to movie critic James King about the latest films you won't want to miss!

programmes.show_name: The Jazz Show with Jamie Cullum
programmes.show_description: Jamie is live from Maida Vale with the Leeds spiritual jazz group Work Money Death. Plus, tracks from Billie Holiday, George Lewis and Roy Ayers.

programmes.show_name: The Good Groove with DJ Spoony
programmes.show_description: Feel-good tunes to make you groove! Plus, Jalen Ngonda chooses the tracks that take him back to the dance floors of his youth in Rewind Selector.
OJ is live through the night from the Salford Riviera and he needs your celebrity puns to build a new team. Plus, Midnight Mastermind, Wish You Were There and Shiftfaced.

programmes.show_name: Sounds of the 90s with Fearne Cotton
programmes.show_description: Robbie Williams is in charge... anything could happen! He's picking all his favourite 90s tunes, and sharing the memories attached.
